new_value: {"notes":"Commit: eb4946009\nResponse::content now warns (via existing defmt/log) on truncation \u003e128B. Truncation still occurs (fixed buffer), but no longer silent. Consistent with other warn! usage. P2 addressed."}

{"notes":"Commit: bd14eccb6\nResponse payload buffer increased to 256 bytes (struct + all constructors + local bufs). Eliminates truncation for typical SenML/CoAP payloads. No silent loss. Matches CoAP practical limits. P2 fixed."}
